problem.title: Point-LIO on KITTI Raw drive 0009 (200 frames, urban)
problem.question: How does Point-LIO perform on the KITTI Raw drive 0009 (200 frames, urban)?

variants.label: Default (no IMU)
variants.intent: LiDAR-only mode; no IMU data available in KITTI Raw fixtures.

variants.label: Fast
variants.intent: Use coarser registration and a smaller local map to speed up point-level Kalman updates; remains LiDAR-only when imu.csv is absent.

variants.label: Dense
variants.intent: Use finer registration and a larger local map with more correspondences; remains LiDAR-only when imu.csv is absent.
